title: Unscented White Household Candles 13.5cm – 2 Packs of 12 (Total of24) – Shabbos/Shabbat Candles for Power Cuts, Emergency, Prayer, Vigil, Church, Long Burning, Decorative & Daily Use
features: 100% Kosher – This pack of candles is manufactured in a Shomer Shabbos factory.
All Occasion Candles Pack – Perfect for Shabbat, Chanukah, Yom Tov or any other Jewish celebrations; also ideal as emergency candles for power cuts.
Smokeless – These unscented candles are smokeless and burn with a steady flame.
Perfect Height – Each candle measures 13.5cm (Length) x 1.9cm (Diameter), just the right size for household use.
What You'll Get – Each order comes with 2 x 12 boxes of AR household candles bulk pack.
description: Product description This White Household Candles Pack of 2x12 pieces is ideal for any indoor lighting. The candles are container-candle type and weigh 8.4E+2g each. These candles are made of natural materials and are available in white. This set of 24 candles comes from the well-known manufacturer Mehadrin Wholesale Ltd and falls under the product category CANDLE. These candles are not suitable for outdoor use and are not emergency candles. This set is ideal for anyone looking for reliable and aesthetically pleasing lighting for their home. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning candles unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish candles when they get too close to the holder or container. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Always keep candles within sight. Properly dispose of candle remnants.
